intro: End-to-end cloud engineering for startup teams that need to ship quickly, stay reliable, and avoid expensive platform mistakes.

services.title: Cloud Architecture
services.description: VPC design, IAM policies, and multi-environment account structure. AWS and GCP are equal focus areas, with Azure-ready patterns when needed. Right-sized for your stage - no over-provisioning.

services.title: CI/CD Pipelines
services.description: GitHub Actions workflows that lint, test, build, and deploy on every push. Zero-downtime deploys with health checks from day one.

services.title: Infrastructure as Code
services.description: Terraform-first modules for repeatable, version-controlled infrastructure, with Pulumi support where it fits. Remote state, workspaces, and secrets management included.

services.title: Containers & Orchestration
services.description: Dockerised services on ECS Fargate, lightweight Kubernetes, or Cloud Run for fast managed deployment. Matched to your scale and budget.

services.title: Monitoring & Alerting
services.description: Observability from day one â€” structured logs, metrics dashboards, uptime alerts, and on-call runbooks your team can actually follow.

services.title: Cost Optimisation
services.description: Audit unused resources, right-size compute, implement spot/preemptible strategies, and plan committed-use or reserved capacity before cloud spend surprises you.

services.title: Security Hardening
services.description: Least-privilege IAM, secrets management, WAF setup, dependency scanning, and SAST pipeline integration. Secure by default, not bolted on after.

services.title: Open-Source Stacks
services.description: Rust/Axum, Python/FastAPI, PostgreSQL, SQLite, React, and Databricks-integrated data workflows - production setups with open tooling and pragmatic managed services.
